thinks.think: A woman with dark hair stands in a kitchen, facing forward and smiling. She wears a bright red shirt and pearl drop earrings. Behind her, white cabinets and a stainless steel range hood are visible. To her left, a red stand mixer sits on the counter. The camera zooms out slightly, revealing more of the mixer and pink flowers.

The camera pans slightly right, shifting the framing. The red stand mixer on the left edge moves further out of view. Simultaneously, bright pink flowers in a dark pot become fully visible on the right foreground. The woman in the red shirt remains centered and smiling throughout the shift.

The video cuts to a close-up of a white rectangular plate featuring triangular slices of fried bread. The dish is garnished with a creamy yellow sauce, slivered almonds, green pistachios, and bright pink rose petals. The plate rests on a light wooden board, with a small bowl partially visible in the top right corner.

The shot remains static on the white rectangular plate holding the golden-brown fried bread triangles. The creamy yellow sauce, slivered almonds, green pistachios, and bright pink rose petals stay fixed in place. No camera movement occurs, keeping the wooden board and small bowl in the background steady throughout this segment.

The static shot persists on the white rectangular plate holding golden-brown fried bread triangles. The creamy yellow sauce, slivered almonds, green pistachios, and bright pink rose petals remain undisturbed on the dish. A dark pink rose and small bowl stay visible in the background without any camera movement or lighting changes occurring.

The static close-up of the white rectangular plate featuring fried bread triangles, creamy sauce, nuts, and pink petals persists. The background rose and bowl remain steady. In the final moment, a solid blue rectangular block abruptly appears in the center of the frame, partially obscuring the food.

A blue square graphic appears over the food containing the white text "Double Ka Meetha". Smaller text "my tasty curry" fades in below. The camera pulls back to show the entire white rectangular plate on a wooden board, with a small bowl and pink rose visible in the background.

The blue square graphic containing white text "Double Ka Meetha" and "my tasty curry" persists centrally over the food. The camera zooms out slightly, widening the view of the white rectangular plate on the wooden board, keeping the pink rose and small bowl visible in the blurred background.

A hand enters from the top right holding a golden spoon, moving it toward the center of the white plate. The spoon hovers over the garnished bread slices while the blue title card with white text remains overlaid in the center of the frame.

The blue title card overlay vanishes from the center of the screen. A hand holding a golden spoon presses down onto the triangular bread slices, scooping up a portion of the dessert to reveal its soft, soaked texture beneath the creamy topping and nut garnish.

The hand lifts the golden spoon, raising a piece of the soaked bread and creamy topping from the white plate. This action reveals the soft, saturated texture of the dessert as the spoonful is separated from the remaining slices garnished with nuts and rose petals.

The hand and golden spoon exit the frame, revealing the full white rectangular plate again. Triangular slices of bread soaked in creamy sauce are garnished with nuts and pink rose petals. The dish rests on a wooden board, with a blurred pink rose in the background.

The white milk inside the silver pan begins to bubble and simmer across the surface as it heats over the blue gas flame. The black text overlay reading "MILK 1 liter" remains fixed in the upper left corner, while the liquid shows active movement from the cooking process.

summary.text:
[0-4] A woman with dark hair, wearing a bright red shirt and pearl drop earrings, stands smiling in a kitchen with white cabinets and a stainless steel range hood. A red stand mixer is visible on the counter to her left. As the camera pans slightly right, pink flowers in a pot come into view on the right foreground while the mixer moves out of frame.
[4-12] The scene cuts to a close-up of a white rectangular plate holding triangular slices of golden-brown fried bread. The dish is topped with a creamy yellow sauce, slivered almonds, green pistachios, and bright pink rose petals. The plate rests on a light wooden board, with a small bowl and a dark pink rose visible in the background. The shot remains static until a blue rectangular block appears in the center.
[12-14] The blue block reveals the text "Double Ka Meetha" in white, with "my tasty curry" fading in below. The camera pulls back to display the full plate of garnished bread on the wooden board.

[18-22] A blue title card vanishes as a hand uses a golden spoon to press and scoop a portion of triangular bread slices soaked in creamy sauce, revealing their soft texture beneath nut and rose petal garnishes. [22-24] The spoon exits, showing the full white rectangular plate on a wooden board with a blurred pink rose in the background. [24-28] The scene cuts to a copper saucepan filled with creamy white liquid, saffron strands, and nuts, surrounded by small bowls of whole almonds and pistachios on a dark surface, remaining static.

[30-36] White milk is poured steadily from a white container into the center of a silver pan with curved handles, resting on a gas stove. The black text overlay reading "MILK 1 liter" persists visibly in the upper left area while the blue gas flame continues burning underneath the cookware. The pouring action concludes, leaving the white liquid settled and still within the pan as the level rises slightly. [36-38] As the heating continues, the white milk inside the silver pan begins to bubble and simmer across the surface. The black text overlay remains fixed, and the liquid shows active movement from the cooking process over the steady blue flame. [38-40] A hand holding a white spatula enters from the top to stir the simmering white milk inside the pan. The liquid is agitated by the spatula while the blue gas flame continues burning steadily underneath the silver cookware with curved handles.

Between 40-46s, a hand stirs simmering white milk in a silver pan with a spatula while a blue flame burns underneath. Central black text reads "COOK ON slow heat for approx 1 hour," remaining on screen as bubbles form on the liquid's surface. At 46s, the text overlay vanishes, and the hand leaves the frame, leaving a metal ladle resting vertically in the simmering milk. From 48-50s, the hand re-enters to grasp the ladle, stirring the now reduced, creamy yellow milk mixture. The liquid appears thick and textured compared to the earlier thin white state, agitated over the steady blue gas flame beneath the silver cookware.

[50-52] A hand stirs a thick, creamy liquid in a silver pan using a metal ladle over a blue gas flame. Small bubbles cover the simmering surface.
[52-54] A second hand enters holding a white cloth to grip the pan's curved handle, steadying the cookware while stirring continues.
[54-56] The mixture appears viscous and yellow as the ladle agitates the simmering surface continuously within the cookware.
[56-60] Black text overlay "SCRAPE sides and bottom of pan" appears as the ladle scrapes the interior surfaces. The second hand maintains its grip on the handle with the cloth throughout this process to stabilize the pan during the vigorous scraping motion.

From [60-68], a hand holding a white cloth grips the handle of a silver pan to stabilize it over a blue gas flame. Another hand uses a metal ladle to continuously stir and scrape a thick, creamy yellow mixture inside the pan. The liquid simmers as the ladle moves along the interior surface. The instructional black text "SCRAPE sides and bottom of pan" remains overlaid in the center of the screen throughout the duration, guiding the action of agitating the mixture against the cookware's sides and bottom.

[68-70] A hand wearing a gold ring sprinkles white sugar into a silver pan containing creamy liquid with saffron strands, while another hand holds a small glass bowl. The text "ADD SUGAR 4Tbsp Sugar and mix" appears over the blue flame.
[70-74] White text appears: "Due to camera disfunction there is no picture of adding sugar but you must add sugar as per your taste". A metal ladle stirs the simmering liquid, replacing the hand, while the "ADD SUGAR" overlay remains.
[74-78] The text overlays vanish. The metal ladle continues stirring the thick, yellowish liquid inside the silver pan over the gas stove. The pan's curved handles are visible as the utensil agitates the smooth mixture continuously.

[78-82] A metal ladle stirs a thick, creamy yellow liquid inside a silver pan with curved handles over a blue gas flame, agitating the viscous mixture. [82-84] The scene shifts to a copper vessel containing the creamy dessert, surrounded by small bowls of almonds, pistachios, and rose petals, with black text overlay instructing "ADD NUTS Keep this in fridge to chill". [84-86] The text vanishes, and the shot cuts to a stack of golden bread slices resting on a wooden cutting board with a handle, while a hand is partially visible at the top right edge.

[88-96] A hand adorned with rings stabilizes a stack of bread slices on a wooden cutting board while a large silver knife cuts diagonally through them. The bread features a golden crust and a white interior containing red fruit pieces. White text reading "FRUIT BREAD 8 slices" appears in the upper left area and remains visible as the blade slices through the loaf. The large silver knife continues its diagonal cut through the stack resting on the wooden board, with a hand wearing gold rings holding the bread steady. As the blade slices through the golden crust and white interior, it separates a triangular section. Finally, the hand separates the triangular slice of fruit bread from the stack as the knife completes the diagonal cut. The cut piece is moved slightly aside on the surface, leaving the separated triangular sections on the wooden board.

From 96-98s, a hand wearing rings arranges a triangular slice of fruit bread with red specks on a wooden board next to other pieces, while 'FRUIT BREAD 8 slices' text is visible. At 98-100s, the text vanishes as a hand brings a rectangular slice of bread into view. Between 100-102s, the hand holds two slices of bread with golden crusts and white interiors over the board where fruit bread pieces rest. From 102-104s, the hand adjusts these two rectangular slices of plain bread, showing their soft interior and brown edges above the stationary fruit bread on the dark countertop.

From [14-18], a blue square graphic with white text "Double Ka Meetha" and "my tasty curry" overlays a white rectangular plate on a wooden board, with a pink rose visible in the background. A hand enters holding a golden spoon, hovering over garnished bread slices. At [28-30], the scene shifts to a silver pan on a lit gas stove where white milk pours from a container, labeled with text "MILK 1 liter". Later, at [86-88], a stack of golden bread slices rests on a wooden cutting board; a hand wearing rings stabilizes the bread while a large silver knife slices diagonally through the stack. By [104-106], a hand holding two slices of plain white bread exits right, leaving triangular slices with red specks and a copper cookie cutter on the board. Finally, at [106-108], a hand turns the silver control knob on a black gas stovetop beneath an empty silver frying pan, with a blurred green plant in the background.

[114-118] A white spatula disappears from the scene, leaving a hand holding a small green bowl above the silver pan. A solid lump of yellow ghee rests in the center of the cookware over the blue gas flame. The white text overlay reading "GHEE 150g" remains visible near the pan handle as the fat sits undisturbed in the heated vessel.
[118-124] As the heat continues, the ghee slowly begins to melt, creating a small pool of liquid fat around the central solid mass. The yellow ghee melts further inside the silver pan, expanding into a wider pool of liquid fat while the solid lump shrinks slightly as it transforms. The white text overlay stays visible near the handle, and the blue flame burns steadily underneath the liquefying substance throughout this process.

[124-132] The white text overlay "GHEE 150g" disappears from the upper left. Inside a silver pan over a steady blue gas flame, yellow ghee melts continuously. The central solid mass shrinks and becomes translucent as it liquefies, expanding the pool of golden oil across the pan's bottom against a blurred background with green foliage. [132-134] A hand wearing a ring uses blue silicone tongs to place a triangular slice of bread with a golden crust into the hot ghee. The bread settles into the oil, beginning to fry with bubbles forming around the edges as the blue flame burns steadily underneath.

[134-140] A triangular bread slice with a golden crust settles into hot yellow ghee inside a silver pan positioned over a steady blue gas flame. Blue silicone tongs release the bread and exit the frame to the left, leaving the slice to fry undisturbed as bubbles form around its edges in the shimmering oil against a blurred background. [140-144] Blue silicone tongs re-enter to hold the triangular bread slice vertically in the hot ghee. The tongs maintain their grip to submerge the bread on its side, then rotate it to fry another side as bubbles rise around the crust within the silver pan.

[144-148] Blue silicone tongs grip a triangular slice of bread, holding it vertically in hot, bubbling ghee inside a silver pan to fry the edges until golden-brown, then lifting it to let excess fat drip off while the blue gas flame burns underneath. [148-150] The tongs hold the bread above the pan before the scene cuts to a yellow pot with a dark wooden handle containing a simmering white liquid. [150-154] The camera remains static on the yellow pot as black text appears over the liquid: "Genreally in Double ka Meetha There is no sugar syrup used but in Shahi Tukda Sugar syrup is added so you can decide as per your taste!"

[156-160] A text overlay vanishes from the view of a yellow pot with a wooden handle and white interior. A hand enters with a silver spoon to stir the simmering clear liquid, creating ripples, before lifting the spoon to display the transparent syrup. [160-164] The scene cuts to a wider angle of the yellow saucepan resting on a black gas burner grate. The pot contains the clear liquid without the spoon present, sitting statically in front of a blurred green plant background.

[154-156] A yellow pot with a white interior and wooden handle holds simmering liquid, overlaid with text: "Genreally in Double ka Meetha There is no sugar syrup used but in Shahi Tukda Sugar syrup is added so you can decide as per your taste!" [164-168] White granular sugar pours from a silver cup into the yellow saucepan resting on a black burner, settling into the clear liquid. [168-170] A hand pours clear water from the silver cup into the pot over the sugar mound. [170-174] A hand stirs the mixture with a silver spoon, blending the sugar into the liquid within the white interior vessel.

[174-182] A hand stirs a clear liquid mixture in a yellow pot with a white interior and wooden handle using a silver spoon. The pot rests on a black gas burner. The spoon is lifted repeatedly, allowing transparent syrup to drip back into the vessel while the liquid settles. The hand holds the spoon elevated to display the clear fluid. [182-184] Red saffron strands appear submerged at the bottom of the stationary syrup. Bold black text "SAFFRON" and smaller white text "Kesar" overlay the upper left inner rim of the pot.

[184-194] A hand holding a silver spoon stirs clear liquid inside a yellow pot with a white interior. Red saffron strands rest at the bottom. The text overlay "SAFFRON Kesar" is visible on the upper left rim. The spoon moves through the mixture, disturbing and mixing the strands into the fluid. As the stirring continues in a circular motion, the syrup transitions from clear to a pale yellow color. Eventually, the text overlay disappears from the rim while the spoon thoroughly blends the saffron strands into the light yellow liquid.

[194-200] A hand continues stirring pale yellow syrup containing red saffron strands inside a yellow pot with a white interior using a silver spoon. The spoon moves through the liquid, keeping the strands suspended as the mixture maintains a light golden hue on the stove burner. [200-206] A silver spoon pours clear sugar syrup over golden-brown triangular bread slices arranged on a white ridged rectangular plate. The black text overlay "SUGAR SYRUP" is visible near the top. The liquid coats the fried pastry, which contains visible red fruit pieces, as the spoon moves slightly to distribute the syrup over the arranged slices.

[206-210] A shiny silver spoon pours clear sugar syrup over golden-brown triangular bread slices arranged on a white ridged plate, with the text "SUGAR SYRUP" displayed in black above. The clear liquid thoroughly coats the fried pastry, which has visible red fruit pieces embedded inside, as the spoon moves slightly to distribute the syrup evenly over the sweet, fried dessert below it. [210-214] Subsequently, another shiny silver spoon drizzles a thick, creamy yellow sauce speckled with green pistachio pieces over the golden-brown triangular bread slices stood vertically on their crisp edges. The rich, custard-like sauce generously coats the top of the fried pastry and drips down the sides onto the white rectangular ridged plate, resting on a light wooden board near a vibrant pink flower and a small ceramic bowl containing nuts in the background. Finally, a hand sprinkles fresh green garnish, labeled with the text "PISTACHIO Pista".

[216-218] A hand sprinkles chopped green pistachios over golden-brown bread slices coated in creamy yellow sauce on a white ridged plate, with the text "PISTACHIO Pista" visible in the upper left corner. [218-222] The text changes to "ALMONDS Badam" as a hand wearing a gold ring sprinkles bright pink rose petals over the dessert, scattering them across the creamy surface and white plate to add vibrant color. [222-224] The text overlay vanishes. A hand holding a golden spoon presses into the garnished fried bread slices, lifting a triangular piece coated in sauce, nuts, and petals from the plate resting on a wooden board.

[224-232] A golden spoon scoops and lifts a saturated piece of fried bread coated in creamy yellow sauce, green pistachios, and pink rose petals from a white rectangular plate. The utensil reveals the soft texture of the bread as a hand on the right separates a bite from the triangular slices. As the spoon exits the frame, the focus remains on the dessert garnished with slivered almonds and nuts, resting on a light wooden board with a blurred pink flower in the background. The video concludes with a logo displaying "my tasty curry by Rekha Kakkar www.mytastycurry.com".

[232-234] A golden spoon exits the frame, leaving a white rectangular plate centered on a light wooden board. Triangular fried bread slices remain, coated in creamy yellow sauce and topped with green pistachios, slivered almonds, and bright pink rose petals. A blurred pink flower is visible in the background.
[234-240] A white screen displays a logo centered in the frame. An orange paint stroke background holds the white text "my tasty curry". Below it, "by Rekha Kakkar" is written in small black letters. A dark blue rectangular box at the bottom contains the white URL "www.mytastycurry.com". The scene remains static.

[4-12] The scene cuts to a close-up of a white rectangular plate holding triangular slices of golden-brown fried bread. The dish is topped with a creamy yellow sauce, slivered almonds, green pistachios, and bright pink rose petals. The plate rests on a light wooden board, with a small bowl and a dark pink rose visible in the background. The shot remains static until a blue rectangular block appears in the center. [12-14] The blue block reveals the text "Double Ka Meetha" in white, with "my tasty curry" fading in below. The camera pulls back to display the full plate of garnished bread on the wooden board. [18-22] A blue title card vanishes as a hand uses a golden spoon to press and scoop a portion of triangular bread slices soaked in creamy sauce, revealing

From 96-98s, a hand wearing rings arranges a triangular slice of fruit bread with red specks on a wooden board next to other pieces, while 'FRUIT BREAD 8 slices' text is visible. At 98-100s, the text vanishes as a hand brings a rectangular slice of bread into view. Between 100-102s, the hand holds two slices of bread with golden crusts and white interiors over the board where fruit bread pieces rest. From 102-104s, the hand adjusts these two rectangular slices of plain bread, showing their soft interior and brown edges above the stationary fruit bread on the dark countertop.

From [14-18], a blue square graphic with white text "Double Ka Meetha" and "my tasty curry" overlays a white rectangular plate on a wooden board, with a pink rose visible in the background. A hand enters holding a golden spoon, hovering over garnished bread slices. At [28-30], the scene shifts to a silver pan on a lit gas stove where white milk pours from a container, labeled with text "MILK 1 liter". Later, at [86-88], a stack of golden bread slices rests on a wooden cutting board; a hand wearing rings stabilizes the bread while a large silver knife slices diagonally through the stack. By [104-106], a hand holding two slices of plain white bread exits right, leaving triangular slices with red specks and a copper cookie cutter on the board. Finally, at [106-108], a hand turns the silver control knob on a black gas stovetop beneath an empty silver frying pan, with a blurred green plant in the background.

[114-118] A white spatula disappears from the scene, leaving a hand holding a small green bowl above the silver pan. A solid lump of yellow ghee rests in the center of the cookware over the blue gas flame. The white text overlay reading "GHEE 150g" remains visible near the pan handle as the fat sits undisturbed in the heated vessel.
[118-124] As the heat continues, the ghee slowly begins to melt, creating a small pool of liquid fat around the central solid mass. The yellow ghee melts further inside the silver pan, expanding into a wider pool of liquid fat while the solid lump shrinks slightly as it transforms. The white text overlay stays visible near the handle, and the blue flame burns steadily underneath the liquefying substance throughout this process.

[124-132] The white text overlay "GHEE 150g" disappears from the upper left. Inside a silver pan over a steady blue gas flame, yellow ghee melts continuously. The central solid mass shrinks and becomes translucent as it liquefies, expanding the pool of golden oil across the pan's bottom against a blurred background with green foliage. [132-134] A hand wearing a ring uses blue silicone tongs to place a triangular slice of bread with a golden crust into the hot ghee. The bread settles into the oil, beginning to fry with bubbles forming around the edges as the blue flame burns steadily underneath.

recent_thinks.text: A silver frying pan rests on a black gas stovetop. A blue flame ignites beneath the pan. A hand wearing a ring is visible near the control knob on the left side. A blurred green plant remains in the background.

A hand holding a small green bowl containing a yellow substance moves over the silver pan on the lit gas stove. White text overlay reading "GHEE 150g" appears next to the bowl as the hand tilts it to pour the ingredient into the pan.

A hand tilts a small green bowl over the silver pan, using a white spatula to scrape a large dollop of yellow ghee into the center. The text "GHEE 150g" remains visible near the bowl as the solid fat lands in the heated cookware above the blue flame.

The triangular bread slice settles into the hot ghee, frying as bubbles form around its edges. The blue silicone tongs release the bread and exit the frame to the left. The silver pan remains on the lit gas burner, with the golden oil surrounding the cooking bread slice.

A triangular bread slice with a golden crust fries in hot yellow ghee inside the silver pan. Bubbles form around the edges as the bread cooks over the steady blue gas flame. The oil shimmers around the submerged slice against a blurred background with green foliage. No utensils are visible as the bread continues to fry.

A triangular slice of bread fries in the shimmering yellow ghee inside the silver pan. Bubbles continuously rise around the edges of the bread as it cooks. The blue gas flame burns steadily underneath the cookware. The background remains out of focus with green plant leaves visible, and no hands or utensils are present in the frame during this interval.

Blue silicone tongs hold a triangular slice of bread vertically in the hot ghee. The bread is submerged on its side while the tongs maintain their grip. The blue gas flame burns steadily underneath the silver pan.

A hand holding a small green bowl containing a yellow substance moves over the silver pan on the lit gas stove. White text overlay reading "GHEE 150g" appears next to the bowl as the hand tilts it to pour the ingredient into the pan.

A hand tilts a small green bowl over the silver pan, using a white spatula to scrape a large dollop of yellow ghee into the center. The text "GHEE 150g" remains visible near the bowl as the solid fat lands in the heated cookware above the blue flame.

A hand sprinkles chopped green pistachios over the bread slices coated in yellow sauce. The text "PISTACHIO Pista" appears in black and white near the top left. The green nuts scatter across the creamy surface and onto the white plate.

The golden spoon exits the frame, leaving the white rectangular plate centered on a light wooden board. Triangular fried bread slices remain, coated in creamy yellow sauce and topped with green pistachios, slivered almonds, and bright pink rose petals. A blurred pink flower is visible in the background.

[194-200] A hand continues stirring pale yellow syrup containing red saffron strands inside a yellow pot with a white interior using a silver spoon. The spoon moves through the liquid, keeping the strands suspended as the mixture maintains a light golden hue on the stove burner. [200-206] A silver spoon pours clear sugar syrup over golden-brown triangular bread slices arranged on a white ridged rectangular plate. The black text overlay "SUGAR SYRUP" is visible near the top. The liquid coats the fried pastry, which contains visible red fruit pieces, as the spoon moves slightly to distribute the syrup over the arranged slices.

[206-210] A shiny silver spoon pours clear sugar syrup over golden-brown triangular bread slices arranged on a white ridged plate, with the text "SUGAR SYRUP" displayed in black above. The clear liquid thoroughly coats the fried pastry, which has visible red fruit pieces embedded inside, as the spoon moves slightly to distribute the syrup evenly over the sweet, fried dessert below it. [210-214] Subsequently, another shiny silver spoon drizzles a thick, creamy yellow sauce speckled with green pistachio pieces over the golden-brown triangular bread slices stood vertically on their crisp edges. The rich, custard-like sauce generously coats the top of the fried pastry and drips down the sides onto the white rectangular ridged plate, resting on a light wooden board near a vibrant pink flower and a small ceramic bowl containing nuts in the background. Finally, a hand sprinkles fresh green garnish, labeled with the text "PISTACHIO Pista".

[216-218] A hand sprinkles chopped green pistachios over golden-brown bread slices coated in creamy yellow sauce on a white ridged plate, with the text "PISTACHIO Pista" visible in the upper left corner. [218-222] The text changes to "ALMONDS Badam" as a hand wearing a gold ring sprinkles bright pink rose petals over the dessert, scattering them across the creamy surface and white plate to add vibrant color. [222-224] The text overlay vanishes. A hand holding a golden spoon presses into the garnished fried bread slices, lifting a triangular piece coated in sauce, nuts, and petals from the plate resting on a wooden board.

[224-232] A golden spoon scoops and lifts a saturated piece of fried bread coated in creamy yellow sauce, green pistachios, and pink rose petals from a white rectangular plate. The utensil reveals the soft texture of the bread as a hand on the right separates a bite from the triangular slices. As the spoon exits the frame, the focus remains on the dessert garnished with slivered almonds and nuts, resting on a light wooden board with a blurred pink flower in the background. The video concludes with a logo displaying "my tasty curry by Rekha Kakkar www.mytastycurry.com".
